name: refactoring
description: Safe refactoring workflow: analyze, refactor, validate with tests

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: Refactoring goal (e.g., 'extract shared utils', 'reduce complexity', 'improve types')

team.name: refactorer
team.role: Senior engineer focused on clean, incremental refactoring with full test coverage

tasks.title: Analyze {{module}} for refactoring
tasks.description:
Analyze {{module}} with the goal: {{goal}}

Produce a refactoring plan in refactor-plan.md:
1. Current state assessment (complexity, coupling, duplication)
2. Proposed changes (ordered by risk, lowest first)
3. Files affected with estimated impact
4. Risks and mitigation strategies
5. Verify all tests pass before any changes

tasks.title: Execute refactoring
tasks.description:
Execute the refactoring plan for {{module}}. Goal: {{goal}}

Rules:
- Follow the plan from refactor-plan.md
- Make incremental changes, verify tests pass after each step
- Preserve all existing behavior (pure refactoring, no feature changes)
- Update imports and references across the codebase

expectations.criteria: Refactoring achieves the stated goal, all tests pass, no behavior changes, code is cleaner
